scripts.lint:php: if [ -x vendor/bin/phpcs ]; then vendor/bin/phpcs -n --runtime-set installed_paths vendor/wp-coding-standards/wpcs,vendor/phpcsstandards/phpcsutils,vendor/phpcsstandards/phpcsextra --standard=.phpcs.xml.dist; else echo 'phpcs not found; run composer install' >&2; exit 1; fi
scripts.publish: npm run clean && npm run lint:php && npm run build:pattern-previews && npm run build:release
scripts.test:a11y: npm run test:prepare && playwright test tests/e2e/a11y.spec.js
scripts.test:business: npm run test:prepare && playwright test tests/e2e/analytics-events.spec.js tests/e2e/navigation.spec.js tests/e2e/shopify-products.spec.js
scripts.test:dev: npm run test:init-theme && npm run test:e2e
scripts.test:e2e: npm run test:prepare && playwright test tests/e2e/mobile-overflow.spec.js
scripts.test:prepare: npm run build:pattern-previews && npm run build:test-previews
scripts.test:visual: npm run test:prepare && playwright test tests/e2e/visual-layout.spec.js
scripts.ts: node -e "console.log('No TypeScript sources to type-check in this theme.')"
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run ts && npm run test:init-theme && npm run test:prepare && playwright test tests/e2e/mobile-overflow.spec.js tests/e2e/visual-layout.spec.js tests/e2e/a11y.spec.js tests/e2e/analytics-events.spec.js tests/e2e/navigation.spec.js tests/e2e/shopify-products.spec.js
